banner.title: LearnWiki {{version}} is available
banner.subtitle: Current version {{current}}
banner.failedFallback: Automatic update is unavailable right now. Please use the release page to download the update manually.

dialog.title: Update ready
dialog.body: LearnWiki {{version}} has been downloaded. Install it and restart now?
dialog.failedBody: LearnWiki ran into a problem while installing the update: {{error}}. You can download it manually from the release page.

settings.sectionDescription: Notifies you when a new version is published on GitHub Releases
settings.autoCheckLabel: Check for updates automatically on launch
settings.autoCheckHint: Silently checks GitHub for a new version each time the app starts
